text:
Evangelion: Death is a soundtrack album of the film Evangelion: Death. The album was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-360, and was released on 11 June 1997. https://vgmdb.net/album/19797 

It reached a peak of number 1 in the Oricon album database. Shirō Sagisu composed most of the music. The disc has several tuning tracks and string solos that are portrayed in the film as being played by the four primary Evangelion pilots. The disc includes as bonus tracks "False Regeneration" from the REBIRTH part of the film as well as Giuseppe Verdi's "Dies Irae (REQUIEM)." The CD is no longer in print. http://www.amazon.com/dp/B000007VS7
